task: Locate articles related to quantum computing on nature.com and list the affiliations of the first three authors found.\nwebsite: https://nature.com
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to nature.com and performed a search for 'quantum computing'. Although it encountered several technical errors and `RefStaleError` during initial navigation and interaction attempts, it demonstrated good recovery by directly navigating to the search results page. From the search results, it correctly identified the first article related to quantum computing. It then clicked into this article and extracted the names and affiliations of the first three authors listed. The output is well-formatted and directly answers the user's request by providing the names and affiliations of the first three authors from the first relevant article found.
